summary: Applied a minimal seam polish: restructured the opening paragraph to avoid repeating the same chapter-entry scaffold as the adjacent chapter while preserving scene information and tone, and tightened the closing audio beat to better hand off into Chapter 4's overnight absence thread.
edits: Rebuilt the first paragraph to open on Noreen's scullery entry (distinct first action/spatial anchor) while retaining the cracked-plate setup and Christmas-morning context.
Adjusted a late closing sentence so Elsie's heard voice is explicitly unanswered, reinforcing continuity into Chapter 4's missing-Tom opening.
